facebook.caption: Tourists walk through Chợ đêm Phú Quốc once and leave. Locals come back every week. There's a difference between browsing a night market and actually knowing it. Grilled seafood straight off the coals. Vendors who don't switch to the tourist menu if you linger. 6,036 reviews and still feels like the real Phu Quoc. Show up after 6pm. Eat first, shop second. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Smoke, sizzle, crowds moving fast. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc after dark is where Phu Quoc actually eats. Skip the resort buffet. Come here instead.

instagram.caption: Locals come back to Chợ đêm Phú Quốc every week. Tourists visit once. Don't be the tourist. Show up after 6pm.
instagram.video_caption: Grilled seafood, real crowds, zero resort vibes. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc hits different after dark.

tiktok.caption: What the resort staff eat after their shift. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Go after 6pm. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightMarket #VietnamFood #NightMarket

scenes: Aerial shot: market lights flood street at dusk
Vendor fans coals, seafood sizzles on grate
Tight shot: prawns, squid, fish lined in rows
Locals eating at plastic stools, no menus
Hands pointing, vendor nods, food hits the plate
Wide shot: crowd thickens, smoke rises, 9pm
